case_title: LINDEE LAURA et al VS FASHION INSTITUTE OF DESIGN AND MERCHANDISING

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LINDEE LAURA LINDEE MARY AS TO DEFENDANT FASHION INSTITUTE OF DESIGN AND MERCHANDISING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-21-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00 TRIAL OF SEP-11-1991 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FASHION INSTITUTE OF DESIGN AND MERCHANDISING
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-21-1991, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO NOV-05-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,543.32 FILED BY FASHION INSTITUTE OF DESIGN AND MERCHANDISING AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LINDEE LAURA LINDEE MARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LINDEE LAURA LINDEE MARY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FASHION INSTITUTE OF DESIGN AND MERCHANDISING NO CASE SHOWN FOR RETURN OF TUITION OR FOR CLAIM OF DAMAGES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT FASHION INSTITUTE OF DESIGN AND MERCHANDISING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LINDEE LAURA LINDEE MARY TUITION CHARGED EXCESSIVE, LOAN CONTRACT ACTION BARRED BY CONSUMER CREDIT ACT; 1803.1 ET SEQ STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE INVALID AS TO LAURA AND MARY LINDEE NO MAILING DONE ON SUBSERVICE.
CORRECTION: NO DELIVERY OF CLAIM DONE TO DEFENDANTS.
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO FASHION INSTITUTE RETURNED, FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED.
